channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-03-05)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-03-05.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] [HOT] UJAM|Get up to 84% off in the UJAM The Rhythm of the World Sale.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Black Octopus|Get 90% off Mega Vocal Bundle 2 by Black Octopus for $59 (Normally $600).?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] SampleScience|SampleScience is offering VHS Waves 80s virtual synth plugin for Mac & Win for free.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] SampleScience|SampleScience is offering Da Vinyl Box sample pack for free.?ENDSSOON!?NEW
[SAVE BIG] [HOT] IK Multimedia|Get up to 80% off in the IK Multimedia MixBox $19.99 Mixing Month Sale.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Dustons|Dustons March Madness Sale : Access Virus Ti / Ti2 / OsTIrus Anthology 80% Off.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Excite Audio|Get Evolve Air Lite by Excite Audio for $1 (reg. $29) at Plugin Boutique + a free gift plugin. Use the code: a64dbdiq.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 97% - Desarrollador: Excite Audio - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [HOT] Universal Audio|Get 71% off UAD Custom 3 Plus by Universal Audio. The discounted price is $199.?NEW
[HOT] Universal Audio|Get 65% off UAD Custom 6 Plus by Universal Audio. The discounted price is $349.?NEW
[HOT] Universal Audio|Get 61% off UAD Custom 10 Plus by Universal Audio. The discounted price is $499.?NEW
[HOT] PSP Audioware|Get 54% off PSP Datamix A567 by PSP Audioware. The discounted price is $68.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] W.A. Production|W.A. Production is offering Zqueezer adaptive filter/frequency shifter plugin for Win & Mac for free. Use the code: plugin100feb.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: W.A. Production - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [HOT] Softube|Softube Weekly Deals – 72% off on Chandler Limited Germanium Compressor.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Mercurial Tones|Mercurial Tones has released Scepter Lite, a free spectral analysis plugin for Mac & Win.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Mercurial Tones - Finaliza: None
